name: UC Asset LP
business: UC Asset LP is a partnership that invests in portfolio investments for capital appreciation, primarily in residential real estate in metropolitan Atlanta. It also develops innovative property concepts such as SHOC (Shared Home-Office Community) to target business travelers. The company operates through wholly-owned subsidiaries that acquire, renovate, and sell or rent properties.
sellsTo: Residential property buyers and renters in Atlanta
Potential business travelers for SHOC properties

exposures.sentence: Our partnership primarily invest in residential properties for capital appreciation in the Atlanta metropolitan area.
We founded SHOC LLC in the fourth quarter of 2020 by contributing an initial capital of $900,000.
we are very interested in the application of block-chain technology and non-fungible token(NFT) technology into real estate development and operations.

catalysts.event: SHOC LLC first investment in 10-unit apartment building in downtown Atlanta
catalysts.sentence: It would make its first investment by acquiring a 10-unit apartment building in downtown Atlanta in April, 2021, for a consideration of approximately $750,000.
